seo.title: Workshop — Bespoke Curtains, Blinds & Reupholstery | Savery's of Broadway
seo.description: British craft at its finest, made in our Cotswolds workrooms. Bespoke curtains and blinds, exquisite reupholstery, and bespoke furniture by Savery's of Broadway.

hero.heading: British craft at its finest, made in the heart of the Cotswolds.
hero.subtitle: Bespoke curtains, blinds, reupholstery and furniture — all made by hand in our Broadway workrooms.

intro.heading: A workshop, not a showroom
intro.body: The workshop is the heart of the practice. It is where ideas become objects — frames cut and joined, fabrics chosen and stitched, springs tied by hand. Everything Saverys makes begins here, on the same site, by the same team. It is a quieter way of working, and an increasingly rare one in British interiors.

items.title: Bespoke curtains & blinds
items.body: Hand-finished to the highest standard, made in our Broadway workrooms with traditional techniques refined over decades.

items.title: Exquisite reupholstery
items.body: Frames stripped, [springs hand-tied](/journal/anatomy-of-a-hand-sprung-seat), and pieces brought back to life using the finest fabrics and materials.

items.title: Bespoke furniture
items.body: [Sofas, armchairs and headboards](/journal/commissioning-a-bespoke-sofa), built from kiln-dried hardwoods and finished by hand for a lifetime of use.

imageBreak.alt: Inside the Savery's hand upholstery workshop, Broadway

process.heading: The process
process.intro: From the first conversation to the moment a room is finished, every stage is handled in-house by people who know the work intimately.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.body: We listen first. A visit to the property, a careful look at the room, the light, and how the space is lived in.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: Schemes developed with physical samples and considered drawings, refined in conversation until every detail is right.

steps.title: Make
steps.body: Pieces built by hand in our Broadway workrooms — frames, springs, fabric, every stage on the same site.

steps.title: Install
steps.body: We're present on the day. Furniture positioned, curtains hung, cushions dressed — the room finished as drawn.

cta.heading: Begin a conversation
cta.body: Whether you're commissioning a single piece or planning a complete scheme, we'd be glad to hear from you.
